skills.name: Stamina Cap Up
skills.description: Increases stamina cap.

skills.name: Mind's Eye/Ballistics
skills.description: Prevents attacks from being deflected. Also shortens the distance before ammo and arrows reach maximum power.

levels.description: Prevents attacks from being deflected. Also shortens the distance before ammo and arrows reach maximum power.

skills.name: Evade Extender
skills.description: Increases evade distance.

skills.name: Tool Specialist
skills.description: Reduces the recharge time for specialized tools.

skills.name: Peak Performance
skills.description: Increases attack when your health is full.

skills.name: Health Boost
skills.description: Increases health.

skills.name: Wide-Range
skills.description: Allows the effects of certain items to also affect nearby allies.

levels.description: Items affect nearby allies with 33% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a wider radius with 33% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a wider radius at 66% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a much wider radius with 66% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a much wider radius with full efficacy.

skills.description: Increases the rate of blast buildup. (Elemental buildup has a maximum limit.)

skills.name: Earplugs
skills.description: Grants protection from large monsters' roars.

levels.description: Slightly reduces the effects of weak monster roars.
Reduces the effects of weak monster roars.
Nullifies weak monster roars and reduces the effects of strong monster roars.
Nullifies weak and strong monster roars.

skills.name: Tool Specialist
skills.description: Reduces the recharge time for specialized tools.

skills.name: Agitator
skills.description: Increases attack power and affinity when large monsters become enraged.

levels.description: While active, grants attack +4 and increases affinity by 5%.
While active, grants attack +8 and increases affinity by 5%.
While active, grants attack +12 and increases affinity by 7%.
While active, grants attack +16 and increases affinity by 7%.
While active, grants attack +20 and increases affinity by 10%.
While active, grants attack +24 and increases affinity by 15%.
While active, grants attack +28 and increases affinity by 20%.
